prompt:
Generate one valid molecule that satisfies all constraints below.
- Connectivity: exactly 1 connected component (single connected molecule).
- Number of F atoms: exactly 1.
- Number of Cl atoms: exactly 1.
- Number of Br atoms: exactly 1.
- Shortest path between F and Cl: exactly 12 bonds (count all bonds on the path, including the bond to each halogen).
- Shortest path between F and Br: exactly 13 bonds (count all bonds on the path, including the bond to each halogen).
- Shortest path between Cl and Br: exactly 13 bonds (count all bonds on the path, including the bond to each halogen).
- Number of rings: exactly 0.
Return only the molecule in the requested output format.
response_contract: Return only a valid JSON object in CommonChem format. No markdown, no code fences, no comments, no surrounding prose. Use top-level keys "commonchem" and "molecules". Set "commonchem" to 10. Return exactly one molecule. Atom objects use "z" and "impHs" when nonzero, plus "chg" when nonzero. Bond objects use "type" and "atoms".
